data.name: AddressCoordinatesRequired
data.value: Address must have valid coordinates. Please select an address from the suggestions.

data.name: AddressInput_AddressHelper_Default
data.value: Select an address from the suggestions

data.name: AddressInput_Error_LookupUnavailable
data.value: Address lookup service is temporarily unavailable

data.name: AddressInput_Error_SelectFromSuggestions
data.value: Please select an address from the suggestions

data.name: AddressInput_GoogleApiUnavailable
data.value: Google Maps API is unavailable. You can still enter the address manually.

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Ability_To_Delete_Pending_Jobs
data.value: Ability to delete all Pending Jobs from the Planner

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Access_As_Administrator
data.value: Access to all the same pages as the Administrator (except for the Settings pages and the Transactions page)

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Access_Reported_Damages_Page
data.value: Access to the Reported Damages page

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Access_Reported_Incompleted_Page
data.value: Access to the Reported Incomplete page

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_AllowAccessCustomerSms
data.value: Enable the Customer SMS tab on the job profile for this user.

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_ChatAccess
data.value: If enabled, this user will be able to send messages for jobs that are associated with his/her locations.

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_ChatVisibility
data.value: If enabled, this user will be able to see the Notes & Chat section within a job profile

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_EnforceEmail2FA
data.value: Enabling this option will require users to sign in with a verified email. If they haven’t verified their email yet, they will be prompted to do so the next time they sign in. Additionally, turning on this option will allow you to enable two-factor authentication (2FA).

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_EnforceEmailVerification
data.value: Enabling this toggle ensures that users must complete an additional layer of security by entering a codesent to their email inbox during every login attempt. This helps protect accounts by requiring a second form of authentication beyond just a password

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_IpBlockExemption
data.value: If enabled, this user will be allowed to log in from any IP address, regardless of the IP Whitelist settings that apply to the rest of the staff.

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_IpWhitelist
data.value: Allow this user to access the platform via the following IP address. Note: This is in addition to the IP whitelist set in your Company Settings.

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_ProfilePhotoUpload
data.value: Drag and drop your image here or click to browse

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Description_TimezoneOverride
data.value: If you’ve set an address for this user, the timezone you set here will be overwritten. Otherwise, if there is no address attributed to this user, the timezone will be set as the value from this dropdown.

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_DispatcherPoint_CloneAndReschedule
data.value: Ability to clone itineraries and reschedule pending jobs

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_DispatcherPoint_FullAccess
data.value: Access to all the same pages and functionalities as a Dispatcher

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Label_Ability_To_Clone_From_Planner
data.value: Ability to clone itineraries and reschedule pending jobs from the Planner

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Label_Ability_To_Delete_From_Planner
data.value: Ability to delete non-started itineraries from the Planner

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Label_Access_To_Managment
data.value: Access to Management's Operators pages (view only)

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Label_NotificationsNewMessagesOperators
data.value: Notifications for new messages from Operators

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Label_SearchCreateUpdateDeleteJobs
data.value: Search, create, update and delete jobs

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_PasswordRule_Complexity
data.value: • Use at least one symbol (e.g., $, !, &, etc.), one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_PasswordRule_LengthSecurity
data.value: • The longer the password, the more secure it is

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_PasswordRule_MinLength
data.value: • Password must be at least 10 characters long

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Span_AccessAllExceptSettingsTransactions
data.value: Access to all pages except Settings and Transactions

data.name: CreateEditEmployee_Span_UpdateDeleteOwnJobs
data.value: Update and delete jobs they created

data.name: CreateEditJob_Error_SaveFailed
data.value: Failed to save the job. Please try again.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_BalanceOwedUsd
data.value: Expected amount to be collected upon arrival.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_Comment
data.value: Note or comment regarding the job for the operator(s) it will be assigned to.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_ConfirmationStatus
data.value: Useful demarcation used in the Route Builder to differentiate jobs by their confirmation status.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_DistributionCenter
data.value: Departure point related to this job

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_JobDetails
data.value: Information related specifically to this job.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_LabelBoxes
data.value: This quantity is used as the number of labels to print

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_Metrics
data.value: Metrics information is related to this job. Value, weight and volume are used as totals if either no actions are created for this job, or none of these fields are defined for added actions. Otherwise, their respective sums will be calculated.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TimePreference
data.value: Time preference the job should be started within.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TimeWindowEnd
data.value: Set the approximate End Time which the Job should be completed and operators should leave Customer site. Note: Do not set this value if you want the platform to automatically calculate accurate end time frame based on the Itinerary route and traffic data.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TimeWindowStart
data.value: Set the approximate Start Time which the Job should be started and operators should be on Customer site. Note: Do not set this value if you want the platform to automatically calculate accurate start time frame based on the Itinerary route and traffic data.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TotalHandleTime
data.value: Amount of time expected to be spent on site for this job.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TotalPieceCount
data.value: Number of items for this job.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TotalQuantity
data.value: Quantity of items for this job.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TotalValueUsd
data.value: Monetary value related to this job.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TotalVolume
data.value: Volume occupied by items related to this job.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Helper_TotalWeight
data.value: Weight occupied by items related to this job.

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_BalanceOwedScale
data.value: Balance owed must have no more than 2 decimal places

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_CommentMaxLength
data.value: Comment must be 2500 characters or fewer

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_FirstNameMaxLength
data.value: First name must be 100 characters or fewer

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_LabelsToPrintMin
data.value: Label / Boxes cannot be less than 0

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_PhoneMaxLength
data.value: Phone number must be 15 characters or fewer

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_PhoneMinLength
data.value: Phone number must be at least 7 characters

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_QuickDescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Quick description must be 10 characters or fewer

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_TargetDateRequired
data.value: Date is required when 'To Be Dated' is not checked

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_TimeWindowEndAfterStart
data.value: End time must be after start time

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_TotalHandleTimePositive
data.value: Total handle time cannot be negative

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_TotalPieceCountPositive
data.value: Total piece count cannot be negative

data.name: CreateEditJob_Validation_TotalValueScale
data.value: Total value must have no more than 2 decimal places

data.name: Crud.ConfirmDeleteMessageHtml
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0}?

data.name: Crud.NoRecords.Subtitle
data.value: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.

data.name: CustomerServiceEmailHelperText
data.value: Email that is shown to clients on the web tracker for Customer Service.

data.name: Error401.Description
data.value: We are sorry for the inconvenience, you do not have permission to access this page.

data.name: Error401.Title
data.value: Oops 😭, You are not authorized to access this page.

data.name: Error404.Description
data.value: We are sorry for the inconvenience, the page you are trying to access has been removed or never existed.

data.name: Error404.Title
data.value: Oops 😭, The page you are looking for is not available.

data.name: Error500.Description
data.value: We are sorry for the inconvenience, the page you are trying to access has been removed or never existed.

data.name: Error500.Title
data.value: Oops 😭, The page you are looking for is not available.

data.name: ErrorLoadingSettings
data.value: An error occurred while loading settings.

data.name: ErrorSavingSettings
data.value: An error occurred while saving settings

data.name: ImageUpload.DefaultDescription
data.value: Drag & Drop or click to choose an image

data.name: ImageUpload.Error.CropProcessFailed
data.value: Failed to process the cropped image. Please try again.

data.name: ImageUpload.Error.ReadDroppedFile
data.value: Failed to read the dropped file. Please try again.

data.name: ImageUpload.Error.ReadSelectedFile
data.value: Failed to read the selected file. Please try again.

data.name: ImageUpload.Error.SizeExceeded
data.value: File exceeds the {0} MB size limit.

data.name: Locations.CustomerServiceEmail.HelperText
data.value: Email that is shown to clients on the web tracker for Customer Service.

data.name: Locations.Errors.LogoUploadFailed
data.value: Location was saved, but logo upload failed: {0}

data.name: Locations.Logo.Current
data.value: Current logo — select a new file below to replace it

data.name: Locations.Logo.HelperText
data.value: Logo that will be displayed on the Web Tracker used by your customers for jobs assigned to this location. We recommend that you upload a square image compressed for the web (ideal dimensions: 512x512; max file size: 2 MB).

data.name: Locations.Logo.UploadDescription
data.value: Drag and drop your image here or click to browse

data.name: Locations.Placeholders.Name
data.value: Location name known by your team

data.name: Locations.Placeholders.ReferenceId
data.value: Reference Number from an external system...

data.name: Operators.Form.Description.ProfilePhotoUpload
data.value: Drag and drop your image here or click to browse

data.name: Operators.Form.Description.TimezoneOverride
data.value: If you've set an address for this user, the timezone you set here will be overwritten. Otherwise, if there is no address attributed to this user, the timezone will be set as the value from this dropdown.

data.name: Password_Validation_Length
data.value: The password length needs at least 8 characters

data.name: Password_Validation_LowercaseRequired
data.value: Password must be between 8 and 256 characters.

data.name: Password_Validation_NumberRequired
data.value: Password must contain at least one number.

data.name: Password_Validation_SymbolRequired
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character.

data.name: Password_Validation_UppercaseRequired
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: PhoneNumber_Appears_To_Be_Missing_Area_Or_Mobile_Code
data.value: Phone number appears to be missing area or mobile code

data.name: PhoneNumber_Invalid_Characters
data.value: Phone number contains invalid characters. Only ASCII letters, digits, and symbols are allowed

data.name: PhoneNumber_Invalid_Format
data.value: The phone number format is invalid

data.name: PhoneNumber_Is_Too_Long
data.value: The phone number is too long

data.name: PhoneNumber_Is_Too_Short
data.value: The phone number is too short

data.name: PhoneNumber_Length_Invalid_For_Selected_Country
data.value: The phone number is invalid for the selected country

data.name: PhoneNumber_Too_Long_For_Selected_Country
data.value: The phone number is too long for the selected country

data.name: PhoneNumber_Too_Short_For_Selected_Country
data.value: The phone number is too short for the selected country

data.name: Please_Enter_Valid_Email_Address
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: Shared.Password.Helper.ComplexityRecommendation
data.value: Use at least a symbol (i.e. $, !, &, etc.), an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number.

data.name: Shared.Password.Helper.LengthRecommendation
data.value: The longer the password, the more secure it is.

data.name: Shared.Password.Helper.MinimumLength
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: The_Suggested_Routing_Should_Generally
data.value:
The suggested routing should generally comply with restrictions for vehicles
within the following measurements:

data.name: Validation.ApiErrorCodes.Employee.EmailAlreadyExists
data.value: An employee with this email already exists.

data.name: Validation.ApiErrorCodes.Employee.IpWhitelistDuplicate
data.value: IP whitelist contains duplicate IP addresses.

data.name: Validation.ApiErrorCodes.Employee.IpWhitelistMaxEntries
data.value: IP whitelist can contain up to 5 entries.

data.name: Validation.ApiErrorCodes.Employee.LocationNotFound
data.value: The selected location was not found.

data.name: Validation.ApiErrorCodes.Employee.PasswordRequired
data.value: Password is required when creating a new employee.

data.name: Validation.ApiErrorCodes.Validation.Generic
data.value: Unable to save employee. Please review the information and try again.

data.name: Validation.PasswordComplexity
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, and one symbol.

data.name: Validation.PasswordConfirmationMismatch
data.value: Password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: Validation.PasswordInvalidCharacters
data.value: Password contains invalid characters. Only ASCII letters, digits, and symbols are allowed.

data.name: Validation.PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.PhoneNumberMaxLength
data.value: Phone number must not exceed 15 characters

data.name: Validation.PhoneNumberMinLength
data.value: Phone number must be at least 7 characters

data.name: Vehicles_Good_Choice_For_Vehicles
data.value: Good choice for vehicles such as Mercedes Sprinter, Ford Transit, light-duty and medium-duty HINOs, ISUZUs, etc.

data.name: Vehicles_Maximun_Work_Time_Helper_Text
data.value: Defining a value in these fields will be taken into consideration for this vehicle when the auto-split functionality is utilized. If no such limitation is required, please set both fields to '0'.

data.name: Vehicles_PlaceHolder_Name
data.value: Vehicle name known by your team

data.name: Vehicles_PlaceHolder_Reference_ID
data.value: Reference id from an external system

data.name: Vehicles_Return_To_Helper_Text
data.value: 1 King Street West, Toronto, ON, Canadá

data.name: Vehicles_Schedule_Break_Blocks_Helper_Text
data.value: Configure up to 3 break windows for this vehicle. Break windows help ensure compliance and realistic route planning.

data.name: Vehicles_Start_From_Helper_Text
data.value: 1 King Street West, Toronto, ON, Canada

data.name: VehicleTypes_RoadBike_Text
data.value:
The suggested routing for this bicycle type will be restricted to
bike access preferring roads.

data.name: VehicleType_CarEnhanced_Text
data.value:
Same as the Car profile, but specifically for delivery and requiring
access to private roads.

data.name: VehicleType_CarEnhanced_Text2
data.value:
The suggested routing for this selection is restricted to wherever cars
have access. This profile is more specifically to fulfill deliveries and to
access private roads (such as gated communities).

data.name: VehicleType_Car_Text
data.value: Ideal for cars, small vans, SUVs.

data.name: VehicleType_Car_Text2
data.value:
The suggested routing for this selection is restricted to wherever
cars have access.

data.name: VehicleType_MountainBike_Text
data.value:
The suggested routing for this bicycle type will be restricted to
bike access with potential off-roading.

data.name: VehicleType_OnFoot_Text
data.value:
The suggested routing will be restricted to foot access for
pedestrians (avoiding hiking trails, mountain paths, and alpine
routes).

data.name: VehicleType_Scooter_Text1
data.value: Moped scooter such as Emco, Motorino, Daymak, etc.

data.name: VehicleType_Scooter_Text2
data.value:
The suggested routing will assume a maximum speed of roughly 50
km/h (30 mph).

data.name: VehicleType_SmallTruckEnhanced_Text1
data.value:
Same as the Small Truck profile, but specifically for delivery and
requiring access to private roads.

data.name: VehicleType_SmallTruckEnhanced_Text2
data.value:
The suggested routing for this selection is restricted to wherever
small trucks have access. This profile is more specifically to fulfill
deliveries and to access private roads (such as gated communities)

data.name: VehicleType_SmallTruck_Text1
data.value:
Good choice for vehicles such as Mercedes Sprinter, Ford Transit,
light-duty and medium-duty HINOs, ISUZUs, etc.

data.name: VehicleType_SmallTruck_Text2
data.value:
The suggested routing should generally comply with restrictions for
vehicles within the following measurements:

data.name: VehicleType_Truck_Text1
data.value:
Heavy duty trucks such as HINO XL series, MAN, Mercedes-Benz
Actros, ISUZU C&E, etc.

data.name: VehicleType_Truck_Text2
data.value:
The suggested routing should generally comply with restrictions for
vehicles within the following measurements:

data.name: VehicleType_UrbanBike_Text
data.value:
The suggested routing for this bicycle type will generally avoid
hills.

data.name: Vehicle_Buffer_PlaceHolder
data.value: Percentage of free space on vehicle

data.name: Vehicle_Capacity_Buffer_Percent
data.value: The capacity buffer must be between 0 and 99.9

data.name: Vehicle_License_Plate_Length_Validation
data.value: The license plate cannot have more than 100 characters

data.name: Vehicle_Name_Length_Validation
data.value: The name of the vehicle cannot have more than 200 characters.

data.name: Vehicle_Vehicle_Reference_Id_Length_Validation
data.value: The vehicle reference Id cannot have more than 100 characters

data.name: Vehicle_Volume_Capacity_Validation_OutOfRange
data.value: Volume capacity is out of range. Please consider a value between 0 and 9999999999999999 lbs

data.name: Vehicle_Weight_Capacity_Validation_OutOfRange
data.value: Weight capacity is out of range. Please consider a value between 0 and 9999999999999999 lbs

data.name: Vehicle_Work_Time_Hours_Validation
data.value: Working Time Hour must be less than or equal to "23".

data.name: Vehicle_Work_Time_Minutes_Validation
data.value: Working Time Minute must be less than or equal to "59".
